# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

repository:
  type: s3
  settings:
    bucket: your-s3-bucket-name
    region: your-s3-region
    base_path: elasticsearch_snapshots
    compress: true
    access_key: your-access-key
    secret_key: your-secret-key

snapshot_policy:
  schedule: "0 30 2 * * ?"  # Daily at 02:30 AM
  name: "<daily-snapshot-{now/d}>"
  repository: s3
  config:
    indices: "*"
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: true
  retention:
    expire_after: 30d
    max_count: 30
    min_count: 1

restore:
  indices: "<specific-index-name>"
  rename_pattern: "(.+)"
  rename_replacement: "restored-$1"
  ignore_unavailable: true
  include_global_state: true
